name: Adosi Serethi
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) female wearing simple clothing - belted braies, a collared shirt, and sack cloth sandals. Currently affected by Ancotar's invisibility experiments, rendering her unseen.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: hostile, insulting, disagreeable, bitter
Role: Adosi Serethi is an ostler living in Aleswell. Her brother Diram Serethi runs the Aleswell Inn. She and the rest of the town's population have been made invisible by Ancotar's wild experiments down in Fort Caractacus.
Home Location Information: The Aleswell Inn, owned by her brother Diram.
Daily Routine: Adosi doesn't do much with her life and is found wandering around the inn all day and night, never eating or sleeping. During the inn's busy hours between 6pm and 9pm, she rejects everybody who tries to come in contact with her.
Personality - The Bitter Sister: Adosi has a low disposition and spends her time insulting both her brother and the rest of the town's population. The only person she doesn't antagonize is her similarly-minded sister Urnsi Serethi. Her constant rejection of visitors during the inn's busy hours causes annoyance for Diram, who is trying to run his establishment.
The Invisibility Affliction: Like the other citizens of Aleswell, Adosi is affected by a powerful invisibility spell caused by Ancotar's experiments in Fort Caractacus.
author: Bethesda
